user.title: PSEG Long Island
user.description: Enter your PSEG Long Island credentials. The integration will automatically log in and obtain authentication cookies.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Please check your username and password and try again.
error.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach PSEG. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.captcha_required: reCAPTCHA challenge triggered. Please try again — it usually passes after a few attempts.
error.addon_unavailable: Addon not available. Please ensure the PSEG automation addon is installed and running.
error.credentials_not_found: No username or password configured. Please reconfigure the integration.
